title: Behold the Amazing Gift of Love

verses.text: Concealed as yet this honor lies, by this dark world unknown, a world that knew not when he came, e'en God's eternal Son.
High is the rank we now possess, but higher we shall rise, though what we shall hereafter be is hid from mortal eyes.
Our souls, we know, when he appears, shall bear his image bright, for all his glory, full disclosed, shall open to our sight.
A hope so great and so divine may trials well endure, and purify our souls from sin, as Christ himself is pure.
